subcodes.first_line: The humble submission of this evanescent servant unto your exalted presence, though I have not been honored to serve in your presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: المعروض من هذا الخادم الفانی الی حضرتکم العالی ولو انی ماتشرفت بخدمتکم فی
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @service to others; to the Cause of God
